name: Baili Xi (百里傒)
title: Five Ram Skin Lord (五羖大夫)
contribution: Key advisor, recommended Jian Shu, helped make Qin hegemon

name: Jian Shu (蹇叔)
title: Upper Daifu (上大夫)
contribution: Wise advisor, opposed failed Zheng campaign

name: You Yu (由余)
origin: Jin person who fled to Rong
title: Guest minister
contribution: Helped defeat Western Rong, added 12 states

name: Shang Yang (卫鞅/商鞅)
title: Lord of Shang (商君), Grand Liangzao
contribution: Major reforms, moved capital to Xianyang, established 41 counties

name: Zhang Yi (张仪)
title: Chancellor
contribution: Diplomatic strategies, served multiple terms as chancellor

name: Wei Ran (魏厓)
title: Lord of Rang (穰侯), Chancellor
contribution: Long-serving chancellor, related to royal family

name: Lü Buwei (吕不韦)
title: Chancellor, Lord of Wenxin
contribution: Helped Zhuang Xiang gain throne, destroyed Eastern Zhou

name: Li Si (李斯)
title: Chancellor
contribution: Key architect of Qin unification policies
